creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Venice is the CUTEST beach town in Florida and makes for the perfect day trip! Just 90 minutes south of Tampa on Florida’s southwest coast. Have you ever been?
1. Cafe Bagel
2. Explore Historic Downtown Venice 
3. Island Bookshop
4. Banana Slider at the Daiquiri Deck
5. Venice Fishing Pier
6. Pina Colada at Sharky's on the Pier
7. Fin's for something upscale
8. Caspersen Beach for snorkeling 
9. 3 Bridges Brewing
10. Venice Beach for the Drum Circle on Sunday nights

#thingstodoinflorida #hiddengemsflorida #venicebeach #veniceflorida #sharkteeth

transcription.text: If you're looking for a day trip to the cutest beach town in Florida, I've got you. Welcome to Venice, otherwise known as the City on the Gulf, located about 90 minutes south of Tampa. This quaint and historical beach town is my home and I'm going to show you exactly what to do for this perfect day trip. When you arrive, you're going to get a breakfast bagel sandwich at a local favorite, Cafe Bagel, then explore historic downtown Venice, which has so many cute shops, art galleries, little parks, and my favorite bookstore, The Island Bookshop. While in downtown, get a daiquiri at the Daiquiri Deck. I recommend the Banana Slider. Then head down to the Venice Fishing Pier to see what the fishermen are catching. You could definitely see a stingray, dolphin, or manatee swimming by while you're here. Then grab a pina colada at Sharky's on the pier, or if you want something more upscale, grab a craft cocktail at Finn's right next door. Then head to Casperson Beach, which is just a couple minutes away from the Venice Fishing Pier, for some snorkeling around the rocks and hunting for shark's teeth. Then head over to Three Bridges Brewing for a smash burger and local beer or cider. This place is also dog friendly, so bring your pup and play a few games of cornhole. Lastly, go to the Drum Circle on Venice Beach, located next to the pavilion, and celebrate the sunset with the locals. This is always a good time. Save this post and send it to someone you would want to go here with.
